default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new Managing Director Jakub Rudnik and provide company updates post-Series A funding.](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX recently closed a $12M Series A round in just 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Company is experiencing rapid growth with 54 deals in pipeline ($7.3M potential)](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Developed a proprietary AI-powered framework for efficient content creation and knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Immediate focus on building capacity to reach 100+ clients and potentially raise Series B](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### Series A Funding and Company Growth

  - [Closed $12M Series A in 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Money wired on Friday, bringing a sense of accomplishment](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Haven't fully celebrated yet due to rapid pace of events](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [All-hands meeting scheduled for tomorrow to discuss developments](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### Current Business Model and Positioning

  - [Offering an extension of client teams, helping them move faster without building large in-house teams](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Starting point of $9,000/month is attractive even for seed-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Focus on editorial and programmatic SEO, with plans to expand into additional work streams](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Exploring content repurposing, lifecycle email marketing, link building, newsletters, and social content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

### AI-Powered Framework Development

  - [Built a proprietary framework to address scaling issues and improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Framework represents workflows as a file system, auto-documented and with a runtime layer](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Enables faster iteration on workflows and prompts (minutes/hours vs. days/weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Example: SEO title generator that can analyze search intent and generate title suggestions in seconds](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Framework plugs into AI coding agents like Cursor, with plans to develop their own version](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Pipeline and Growth Projections

  - [54 deals in pipeline, totaling $7.3M potential revenue](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Main bottleneck is capacity to handle kickoffs (limited to 2 per week currently)](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Q1 numbers already hit, bookings extend into Q2](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Goal to reach 20-25M ARR this year, potentially enabling a Series B raise at 40-50x multiple](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

### Team Structure and Expansion

  - [Implementing a pod structure with Managing Directors overseeing multiple pods](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Pods led by Managing Editors, with various roles underneath (account managers, editors, copywriters, designers)](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Hiring new Managing Editors and expanding team to meet demand](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Jakub to take over 1-2 existing pods and help build a new pod with an incoming Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Add Jakub to account reviews and relevant meetings](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Compile and share recordings of kickoffs, trainings, and sales calls for Jakub's onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Jakub to review Notion documentation and suggest improvements](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Focus on building capacity and improving processes to scale and retain/expand accounts](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Explore bringing in additional advisors and well-known figures in the space to boost reputation](https://fathom.video/share/VkQN4jUvMJ8Bs1QQG8mQVwAcjFU8pdXK?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)

action_items.description: Compile & share recordings (kickoff, trainings, sales) for Jakub to review
Talk to Kyle re: full account overview for Jakub
